|\r\n | x |\r\n\r\n @PIM @TC-014\r\n Scenario Outline: Validate SQL Injection protection\r\n When the user enters \"\" into Employee Name\r\n And clicks Search\r\n Then unauthorized records should not be returned\r\n And the application should remain stable\r\n Examples:\r\n | maliciousInput |\r\n | ' OR 1=1 -- |\r\n | admin' -- |\r\n | ' UNION SELECT * FROM users -- |\r\n\r\n @PIM @TC-015\r\n Scenario Outline: Create and find employee\r\n Given a new employee is created with:\r\n | firstName | lastName |\r\n | | |\r\n When the user searches using generated employee id\r\n Then the created employee should be displayed\r\n Examples:\r\n | firstName | lastName |\r\n | Leslie | Prueba |\r\n\r\n @PIM @TC-016\r\n Scenario Outline: Delete employee and validate removal\r\n Given employee \"\" exists\r\n When the employee is deleted\r\n And searches by employee id \"\"\r\n Then no records should be found\r\n Examples:\r\n | employeeId |\r\n | 0460 |\r\n\r\n @PIM @TC-017\r\n Scenario: Delete employee and validate removal\r\n Given a new employee is created with:\r\n | firstName | lastName |\r\n | Erick | Rojas |\r\n When the employee is deleted\r\n And the user searches using generated employee id\r\n Then no records should be found\r\n","mediaType":"text/x.cucumber.gherkin+plain"}},{"gherkinDocument":{"uri":"file:///C:/Users/ldelabarreramorales/IdeaProjects/simpleTestAutomation_Git/src/test/resources/features/PIM.feature","feature":{"location":{"line":2,"column":1},"tags":[{"location":{"line":1,"column":1},"name":"@PIM","id":"9d49e026-f1d3-4b71-96fb-a4d380c9b6db"}],"language":"en","keyword":"Feature","name":"Employee
